allow: Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.main import create_app; app = create_app\(\); routes = [r.path for r in app.routes]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(routes\)\)\)")

Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.models.enums import LeadState, IntentType, PropertyType; print\('LeadStates:', [s.value for s in LeadState]\); print\('Intents:', [i.value for i in IntentType]\)")

Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.database import Base, engine, SessionFactory, TimestampMixin, check_database_connection, get_db_session; print\('engine:', engine.url.render_as_string\(hide_password=True\)\); print\('Base metadata tables:', list\(Base.metadata.tables.keys\(\)\) or '\(empty — no models registered yet\)'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.dependencies import SettingsDep, DbSessionDep; print\('SettingsDep:', SettingsDep\); print\('DbSessionDep:', DbSessionDep\)")
